name: Loop
summary: Loop is a low level topology class that will not need to be used often. A Loop is a chain of Edges that bound a Face.

methods.name: convex?
methods.summary: Determine if the loop is convex.
methods.remarks: Determine if the loop is convex.

returns.doc: status - true if convex, false if not convex.

methods.name: edges
methods.summary: Get an array of the edges that define the loop in an ordered sequence.
methods.remarks: Get an array of the edges that define the loop in an ordered sequence.

returns.doc: edges - an array of Edge objects if successful.

methods.name: edgeuses
methods.summary: Get an array of the EdgeUse objects that define this loop in an ordered sequence.
methods.remarks: Get an array of the EdgeUse objects that define this loop in an ordered sequence.

returns.doc: edgeuses - an array of EdgeUse objects if successful.

methods.name: face
methods.summary: Get the Face object that is bounded by this loop.
methods.remarks: Get the Face object that is bounded by this loop.

returns.doc: face - a Face object if successful

methods.name: outer?
methods.summary: Determine if this is an outer loop.
methods.remarks: Determine if this is an outer loop. Each face has one outer loop, and will have one loop for each hole.

returns.doc: status - true if the loop is an outer loop, false if it is not an outer loop.

methods.name: vertices
methods.summary: Get an array of the vertices that define the loop in an ordered sequence.
methods.remarks: Get an array of the vertices that define the loop in an ordered sequence.

returns.doc: vertices - an array of Vertex objects if successful.
